name: gcli-benchmark-prototype
description: Deterministic contributor eval harness for Gemini CLI, with benchmark suites, regression reporting, and inspectable artifacts

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.run: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
scripts.list: npm run build && node dist/cli.js list
scripts.gaps: npm run build && node dist/cli.js gaps
scripts.compare: npm run build && node dist/cli.js compare
scripts.draft-task: npm run build && node dist/cli.js draft-task
scripts.validate-task: npm run build && node dist/cli.js validate-task
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --test tests/unit/task-loader.test.js tests/unit/scoring-reporting.test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --test tests/integration/task-execution.test.js tests/integration/cli-commands.test.js tests/docs-assets.test.js
